title: CCP-16: Define load balancing algorithm (TDMA, adaptive SF, density-aware)
description: Draft detailed spec for TDMA slot allocation, SF adaptation based on SNR/density, multi-channel assignment. Include test vectors. Must be approved before code impl.
close_reason: Spec, vectors, and reviews complete; converged on TDMA adaptive SF multi-channel density-aware load balancing for CCP-16
